tools.name: list_destinations
tools.title: List destinations
tools.description: List all allergy-friendly travel destination guides on the site, with id, name, country, and a short description. Use the returned id with get_destination_guide.

query.description: Optional case-insensitive filter matched against name, country, or description.

tools.name: get_destination_guide
tools.title: Get destination guide
tools.description: Get the full allergy-friendly guide for one destination by its id (from list_destinations): intro, hotels, restaurants, FAQs, and travel tips.

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.title: Search allergy-friendly hotels
tools.description: Search allergy-friendly hotels across all destination guides by keyword (hotel name, destination, or allergy info). Returns matching hotels with the destination they belong to.

query.description: Keyword, e.g. 'gluten-free London', 'nut-free', or a hotel name.

limit.description: Max results to return. Defaults to 20.
